title: Disembarking at Every Station on the Kururi Line
overview: Kikuchi eagerly accepts a travelog manga job but finds herself bored to death because she doesn't have the slightest interest in stations or hopping on and off trains. At the end of the day, she found salvation in enjoying specialized Eki-Ben (Station Lunch Box).

title: 130 yen, 1 Metropolitan Area & 6 Prefectures
overview: Tetsuko's Travel crew traveled from one station to the next which cost 130 yen but used the longest way around route through 7 prefectures instead,  without exiting the station

title: Doai / Yubiso: Date Course, Tetsuko Style
overview: A young lady joins Tetsuko's crew traveling on the Niigata Prefecture railroad using a weekend train pass, dubbed  "Date Course" by Yokomi.

title: South Tohoku, Yokomi Special
overview: The crew travel to Southern Tohoku but Kikuchi is less interested at first, because of the sudden change in the person in charge of the project. Alas, when Yokomi claims the travel is "special" there are a lot of surprises (and frustration) await her.
